    isValidAddress(String, int) - Static method in class com.sait.workshop05.util.Validator
    Validates address lines with looser punctuation than names.
    isValidEmail(String) - Static method in class com.sait.workshop05.util.Validator
    Validates email structure before API calls and form submission.
    isValidName(String, String) - Static method in class com.sait.workshop05.util.Validator
    Validates person name fields with limited punctuation support.
    isValidPhoneNumber(String) - Static method in class com.sait.workshop05.util.Validator
    Validates phone input using the desktop ten digit rule.
    isValidPostalCode(String) - Static method in class com.sait.workshop05.util.Validator
    Validates postal code using the canonical Canadian format.
    isValidProvince(String) - Static method in class com.sait.workshop05.util.Validator
    Validates province as a two letter uppercase code.
